property.name: java.library.path
property.value:
C:\Program Files\Apache NetBeans\jdk in;C:\Windows\Sun\Java in;C:\Windows\system32;C:\Windows;C:\Program Files\Common Files\Oracle\Java\javapath;C:\Windows\system32;C:\Windows;C:\Windows\System32\Wbem;C:\Windows\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\Windows\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\Program Files
odejs\;C:\Program Files\Microsoft SQL Server\Client SDK\ODBC\170\Tools\Binn\;C:\Program Files\Microsoft SQL Server\150\Tools\Binn\;C:\Program Files\dotnet\;C:\Users\Student\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Users\Student\AppData\Roaming
pm;C:\Users\Student\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code in;C:\Users\Student\AppData\Local\GitHubDesktop in;C:\Users\Student\.dotnet	ools;C:\Users\Student\AppData\Roaming
pm;;.

testcase.name: testUserValidations
testcase.system-out: === Testing: Valid user with correct credentials === Username: ali_s Password: Valid@123 Cell Phone: +27831234567 Registration and login successful for ali_s

testcase.name: testUserValidations
testcase.system-out: === Testing: Another valid user === Username: bob_1 Password: Secure#99 Cell Phone: +27839876543 Registration and login successful for bob_1

testcase.name: testUserValidations
testcase.system-out: === Testing: Valid user, phone with 1 digit after code === Username: tha_o Password: Pass@1234 Cell Phone: +27123456789 Registration and login successful for tha_o

testcase.name: testUserValidations
testcase.system-out: === Testing: Username too long (more than 5 chars) === Username: charlie_brown Password: Valid@123 Cell Phone: +27831234567 Validation failures correctly detected for charlie_brown

testcase.name: testUserValidations
testcase.system-out: === Testing: Username missing underscore === Username: diana Password: Valid@123 Cell Phone: +27831234567 Validation failures correctly detected for diana

testcase.name: testUserValidations
testcase.system-out: === Testing: Empty username === Username: Password: Valid@123 Cell Phone: +27831234567 Validation failures correctly detected for

testcase.name: testUserValidations
testcase.system-out: === Testing: Password too short === Username: fra_k Password: weak Cell Phone: +27831234567 Validation failures correctly detected for fra_k

testcase.name: testUserValidations
testcase.system-out: === Testing: Password missing uppercase, digit, special === Username: gra_e Password: password Cell Phone: +27831234567 Validation failures correctly detected for gra_e

testcase.name: testUserValidations
testcase.system-out: === Testing: Password missing special character === Username: hen_y Password: Password1 Cell Phone: +27831234567 Validation failures correctly detected for hen_y

testcase.name: testUserValidations
testcase.system-out: === Testing: Phone missing international code === Username: ivy_ Password: Valid@123 Cell Phone: 08966553 Validation failures correctly detected for ivy_

testcase.name: testUserValidations

failure.message: Phone validation failed for: +278312345678 ==> expected: <false> but was: <true>

testcase.failure: org.opentest4j.AssertionFailedError: Phone validation failed for: +278312345678 ==> expected: <false> but was: <true> at org.junit.jupiter.api.AssertionFailureBuilder.build(AssertionFailureBuilder.java:151) at org.junit.jupiter.api.AssertionFailureBuilder.buildAndThrow(AssertionFailureBuilder.java:132) at org.junit.jupiter.api.AssertEquals.failNotEqual(AssertEquals.java:197) at org.junit.jupiter.api.AssertEquals.assertEquals(AssertEquals.java:182) at org.junit.jupiter.api.Assertions.assertEquals(Assertions.java:1156) at LoginTest.lambda$testUserValidations$1(LoginTest.java:114) at java.base/java.util.Optional.ifPresent(Optional.java:178) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1604) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1604)
testcase.system-out: === Testing: Phone has more than 10 digits after code === Username: jac_k Password: Valid@123 Cell Phone: +278312345678

testcase.name: testUserValidations
testcase.system-out: === Testing: Phone contains space === Username: kel_y Password: Valid@123 Cell Phone: +27 831234567 Validation failures correctly detected for kel_y

testcase.name: testUserValidations
testcase.system-out: === Testing: Empty phone number === Username: leo_ Password: Valid@123 Cell Phone: Validation failures correctly detected for leo_

testcase.name: testUserValidations
testcase.system-out: === Testing: Username invalid and password invalid === Username: mon Password: weak Cell Phone: +27831234567 Validation failures correctly detected for mon
